content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows NIFTY -0.44% with US markets weak overnight (S&P -0.38%, Dow -0.63%). VIX elevated at 16.62. However, the existing book is showing strong unrealized gains (+₹13,323) with multiple positions at favorable extensions. Priority is risk management on held positions — trail SLs aggressively on winners while respecting the 1% gap rule, and avoid panic-stacking new entries pre-open.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.8%, SL already at 1035 (above entry, locking ~5% gain). CMP 1051.60, SL 1035 = 1.6% gap, well above 1% floor. Doji + Bearish Engulfing recent + RBI HFC oversight overhang + 30% one-month rally suggests consolidation risk. Keep SL where it is; don't tighten further (would breach 1% gap rule). HOLD effectively — emitting MODIFY with same values is wasted; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1035 already locks +5.2% gain, gap to CMP 1051.60 = 1.6% (above 1% floor). Tightening further risks self-stopout on consolidation. Hold to target 1110 or SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5%, SL 121 (3.3% below CMP 124.47), MACD bearish crossover but structurally supportive macro backdrop. Hold to SL or target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.1%, CMP 1732.80. CURRENT stored SL is 1735 — that is ABOVE CMP 1732.80, meaning the position is already effectively stopped on first downtick. This is a self-induced stopout risk (prior failure mode). MUST loosen SL — but rule states SL can only be tightened. Cannot loosen. Therefore EXIT is correct action since current SL is above CMP and will trigger immediately on open."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1735 is ABOVE CMP 1732.80 (verified arithmetic: 1735 > 1732.80). The SL will trigger on any flat-to-down open, locking gains. Cannot loosen SL per rules. Better to exit cleanly at MARKET capturing ~+2% than let SL fire on open. Promoter 2% block sale also creates near-term overhang. Net realized gain ~₹1,050."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4699.10,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +4.8%, CMP 4782.10, SL 4699.10 (1.7% gap, above 1% floor). Q4 results May 14 — binary event in 5 trading sessions, just outside the 3-session binary rule but warrants caution. SL already locks +2.7% gain. Hold position with current SL — no MODIFY needed (no-op), switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 4699.10 locks +2.7% gain, 1.7% gap to CMP. Q4 May 14 (5 sessions out — outside 3-session binary window). Will reassess as event nears. Defense thesis intact post Operation Sindoor. Target 4875 (JM Financial)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.1%, CMP 7085. Current stored SL 6960 is 1.8% below CMP — adequate gap. Tighten SL to entry (6900) is LOOSER than current 6960 — REJECTED. Switching to HOLD. SL 6960 already locks marginal gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 (1.8% below CMP 7085) appropriate. Q4 PAT +124% YoY, near lifetime high. Hold to target 7400 or SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.9%, CMP 844.30. SL 836 already locks ~-0.2% (essentially breakeven minus). Cannot tighten further given 1% gap rule (836 to 844 = 1.0%). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 836 sits 1.0% below CMP — at floor. Q4 results pending May; HSBC TP cut to 1425 from 1980 on slow execution. Hold to target 900 or SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held flat, CMP 369, SL 365 (1.1% gap). Strong Q4 (PAT +30.6% YoY), Macquarie TP 415. Hold to target 388 or SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.5%, CMP 832.15, SL 815 (2.1% gap). Q4 revenue +22% YoY, MOFSL TP 950. Hold to target 860 or SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.0%, CMP 1285.30 (10% upper circuit on Q4 print). SL 1260 (2.0% gap). Q4 PAT +134%, FY27 EBITDA margin >20.5% guidance, multiple broker upgrades to TPs Rs 1900-2200. Hold to target 1330 or SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.4%, CMP 3093.80, SL 3025 (entry, 2.2% gap). May 12 concall — binary event in 2 sessions (within 3-session binary rule). Position size ~5% of capital — within event-trade size threshold. SL at entry caps downside; thesis intact (Q4 PAT +24%, NGC contract pending, Navratna upgrade). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.6%, CMP 835.90, SL 806 (3.6% gap). Bullish Marubozu on May 5 with massive volume. Target 855 close (only 2.3% upside) — consider raising target. But stored target 855 is conservative; let it hit and re-evaluate. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 locks +5.2%, 1.6% gap to CMP, at safe trailing zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal loss, SL 3.3% below CMP, structural macro intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1735 is ABOVE CMP 1732.80 — will trigger on flat open. Cannot loosen SL. Exit at MARKET to capture +2% cleanly rather than let SL fire."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4699.10 locks +2.7%, 1.7% gap. Q4 May 14 outside 3-session binary window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960, 1.8% gap to CMP. Lifetime high zone, Q4 already printed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 836 at 1% gap floor; Q4 pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 365 at 1.1% gap; strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 815 at 2.1% gap; Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Upper circuit print, SL at 1260 = 2% gap, broker upgrades."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "May 12 concall in 2 sessions — within event window. Position size ~5%, SL at entry. Acceptable event-trade configuration."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 806 at 3.6% gap; Bullish Marubozu intact."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates not admitted today and reasons (per Rule 18): (1) BHEL +0.08 — re-entry cooldown active (previously held); P/E 224 stretched, JPMorgan UW target 220 = 46% downside, polarized broker view. NO. (2) POLYCAB +0.10 — at fresh 52w high after Q4 print, chase-risk; PAT growth lagging revenue. Wait for pullback to 8400-8500. NO today. (3) LUPIN +0.12 — earnings call TODAY (May 8) is binary event within 0 sessions; stock at record high post-print. Rule 11 violation if entered. NO. (4) HDFCBANK +0.03 — modifier too low (<+0.05 threshold); -20% YTD with weak NII growth. NO. (5) HAL/NAVINFLUOR/COFORGE/GRSE/CAMS/ABCAPITAL/MARICO — already held. (6) ADANIPORTS — exiting today; cooldown applies. Pre-market is risk-off (NIFTY -0.44%, US weak). Deployment will drop to ~49% post-ADANIPORTS exit; will scan post-open for confirmation entries on POLYCAB pullback or BHEL on cooldown clearance.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Pre-market risk-off bias + 11 existing positions covering Capital Goods (HAL/TITAGARH/GRSE), BFSI (PNBHOUSING/ABCAPITAL/CAMS), Specialty Chem (NAVINFLUOR), IT (COFORGE), Services (ADANIPORTS — exiting), FMCG (MARICO), Defensive ETF (GOLDBEES). Capital Goods cluster = HAL ~50% of capital allocation in that bucket; TITAGARH+GRSE adds defense-shipbuilding subcluster. No new Capital Goods admits today. ADANIPORTS exit is forced by SL-above-CMP arithmetic, not thesis. Watch for HFCL pending order (3141min OPEN) — should cancel if not filled today, thesis stale."
}
